projects.name: 投資頻道
projects.summary: 首個 90 天驗證：建立穩定主持、每週解說形式與可衡量的觀看留存。

projects.name: SunTravel／PersonalFootage 影片製作
projects.summary: 以 /Users/sws/PersonalFootage 為影片製作總庫：素材去重、GPS 分組、Gemini 選鏡、直橫剪輯、四語 YouTube 文字軌與攻略式 Reels。

projects.name: B2B 影片套件
projects.summary: SonaSNS 的加購製作服務；Okiblues 為第一個客戶案例。

projects.name: 人才資料庫
projects.summary: 聲音、視覺身分和出鏡紀錄先由 Saul 管理，達成畢業條件後再獨立。

projects.name: AI 角色網劇
projects.summary: 儲備主題、音樂資產與測試場景；目前不獨立開設頻道。

projects.name: 遊戲／電影／亞洲評論
projects.summary: 投資頻道驗證期結束後才重新評估；製作前必須完成權利檢查。

radar.title: 把每個訊號轉成製作問題
radar.detail: 它是否適合現有頻道、擁有可安全使用的素材，以及是否給觀眾一個具體的停留理由？

radar.title: 旅遊素材：第一次參與的攻略
radar.detail: 不做全天流水帳；改用具體問題：要先知道甚麼、怎樣參與、哪些可以跳過。

radar.title: 投資頻道：先建立可重複驗證的形式
radar.detail: 在增加頻道數之前，先以穩定主持的解說片測試留存。

briefs.title: 日本 Field Notes — 日光
briefs.focus: 建立可供文字敘事旅遊片使用的基礎音樂庫。
briefs.summary: 今日先以純音樂測試 6 個實用剪輯情境；選出最好的兩首，日後再以具商用條款的平台正式重製。
prompts: Instrumental only. 30 seconds, 90 BPM. Editorial travel score for a quiet Tokyo food-and-walking film. Warm Rhodes, muted nylon guitar, brushed percussion, soft upright bass, natural room tone. First 3 seconds sparse for a map pin, then gentle forward motion. No vocals, no dramatic drop, clean 2-second ending.

Instrumental only. 30 seconds, 88 BPM. Clean urban-morning cue for a practical travel guide. Soft marimba, light bass pulse, minimal hand percussion, no lead melody. Loop-friendly with 1.5 seconds of quiet at the start for a location card. No vocals, no artist references.

Instrumental only. 30 seconds, 92 BPM. Dinner-table travel film cue: subtle electric piano, brushed snare, warm bass and a discreet 8-bar lift after 12 seconds. Keep the food close-up elegant rather than romantic. No vocals, clean 2-second ending.

Instrumental only. 30 seconds, 76 BPM. Winter-night Japan ambience for a moody Reel. Felt piano fragments, distant room tone, soft low synth and one restrained bell texture. Leave negative space for on-screen text; no beat drop, no vocals, loop point at 28 seconds.

Instrumental only. 30 seconds, 100 BPM. Useful city-guide cue for maps, prices and step-by-step tips. Tight muted guitar, clean claps, light analog bass and crisp but restrained percussion. Strong first-second hook, no vocals, no artist references, clean ending.

Instrumental only. 30 seconds, 84 BPM. Neutral travel-planning background for packing, booking and transit information. Airy electric piano, soft plucked strings, minimal percussion and a calm forward pulse. Designed beneath captions and ambient sound; no vocals, no dramatic climax, seamless loop.
